overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The player approaches a large rock formation where a hostile NPC or creature becomes visible in the final moments.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. The path is illuminated by a warm flashlight held in the left hand, revealing trees and undergrowth on both sides. A large rock formation becomes visible on the left as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with rock formation and hostile encounter

segments.scene_description: Approaching the large rock formation where a hostile NPC or creature is now visible crouched in the darkness on the left. The flashlight illuminates the figure and surrounding area as the camera continues moving forward along the trail, passing a fallen branch on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a dark forest trail that leads from a secluded woodland path toward a menacing encounter. It begins with the camera advancing down a narrow dirt trail, where a warm flashlight held in the left hand cuts through the night to reveal dense trees and undergrowth. As the camera moves forward, the beam of light catches a large rock formation emerging from the shadows on the left. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches the rocks, illuminating a hostile creature crouched in the darkness. Finally, the movement continues past a fallen branch on the right, keeping the figure in sight as the path narrows.
